mapper.select: SELECT mr.matching_record_id, mr.order_id, o.order_no, o.order_status, mr.employee_id, NULL AS employee_name, NULL AS employee_tier, mr.matching_mode, mr.matching_status, mr.d_c_ratio, mr.expected_bonus, mr.expected_productivity, mr.quality_risk, mr.work_start_at, mr.work_end_at, mr.comment, mr.created_at FROM matching_record mr JOIN orders o ON mr.order_id = o.order_id WHERE mr.matching_record_id = #{matchingRecordId}

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(mr.created_at) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS today_assigned_count, SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'ANALYZED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unassigned_count, ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN mr.matching_status = 'CONFIRM' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(mr.matching_record_id), 0), 1 ) AS accuracy, ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT employee_id) FROM matching_record WHERE matching_status = 'INPROGRESS' ) AS active_worker_count FROM orders o LEFT JOIN matching_record mr ON o.order_id = mr.order_id

SELECT fl.factory_line_id, fl.factory_line_name, mr.employee_id, NULL AS employee_name, NULL AS employee_tier, DATE(mr.created_at) AS assigned_date, mr.matching_status, o.order_no, o.order_status, mr.work_start_at, mr.work_end_at FROM matching_record mr JOIN orders o ON mr.order_id = o.order_id LEFT JOIN worker_deployment wd ON mr.employee_id = wd.employee_id AND DATE(mr.created_at) BETWEEN wd.start_date AND COALESCE(wd.end_date, CURDATE()) LEFT JOIN equipment eq ON wd.equipment_id = eq.equipment_id LEFT JOIN equipment_process ep ON eq.equipment_process_id = ep.equipment_process_id LEFT JOIN factory_line fl ON ep.factory_line_id = fl.factory_line_id ORDER BY fl.factory_line_id, assigned_date, mr.work_start_at

SELECT fl.factory_line_id, fl.factory_line_name, COUNT(DISTINCT wd.employee_id) AS total_technician_count, 0 AS tier_s_count, 0 AS tier_a_count, 0 AS tier_b_count, 0 AS tier_c_count, 0 AS recommended_count FROM factory_line fl LEFT JOIN equipment_process ep ON fl.factory_line_id = ep.factory_line_id LEFT JOIN equipment eq ON ep.equipment_process_id = eq.equipment_process_id LEFT JOIN worker_deployment wd ON eq.equipment_id = wd.equipment_id AND (wd.end_date IS NULL OR wd.end_date >= CURDATE()) GROUP BY fl.factory_line_id, fl.factory_line_name

SELECT fl.factory_line_id, fl.factory_line_name, wd.employee_id FROM factory_line fl LEFT JOIN equipment_process ep ON fl.factory_line_id = ep.factory_line_id LEFT JOIN equipment eq ON ep.equipment_process_id = eq.equipment_process_id LEFT JOIN worker_deployment wd ON eq.equipment_id = wd.equipment_id AND (wd.end_date IS NULL OR wd.end_date >= CURDATE()) ORDER BY fl.factory_line_id, wd.employee_id
